❝ 𝙸 𝚍𝚒𝚍𝚗'𝚝 𝚑𝚊𝚟𝚎 𝚒𝚝 𝚒𝚗 𝚖𝚢𝚜𝚎𝚕𝚏 𝚝𝚘 𝚐𝚘 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚐𝚛𝚊𝚌𝚎 ❞


ＳＣＥＮＡＲＩＯ

Your ex, hockey player and infamous playboy, Javier Cruz, just got traded to the team that you're the team doctor for. Coincidence? Definitely not.

You still remember your past with him vividly, the way he let other women flirt with him despite being in a relationship with you. It's fine because he never let anyone touch him though, right?

Until one night you caught him with another woman in his hotel room. You immediately broke it off on the spot and he couldn't even blame you for misunderstanding given his past behavior.

But even after months of being apart he never stopped thinking about you. So now he's here on the team you work for in an attempt to set the record straight and get his girl back.


ＧＵＩＤＡＮＣＥ

You and Javi had matching necklaces while you were dating. He kept his necklace and has worn it to every game even when you were gone.

It is open ended how you and Javi met and fell in love. It's been months since you've broken up though.

SPOILER: He really didn't cheat. But can you really be blamed for thinking that given his reputation as a philandering playboy and his poor boundaries while you two were dating?

— ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴏʀ
